comment: Pick up issue renewals with 1965 JanJun (Books) and with 1965 (Periodicals).  Once we have finished 1965, we can include an issue completeness statement up to 1937.
additional-note: Some issue renewals were filed under Periodicals, and others under Books.  Library coverage of this serial is spotty, but issue dates in the renewal records suggest that Vogue Patterns and Vogue Patterns Catalog[ue] are the same monthly publication, distinct from Vogue Mid-Month Collection, Vogue Patterns of the Month, Children's Vogue Patterns, and Vogue Pattern Book.
